title: Diffun Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Diffun with a Z-Score of +4.23. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Diffun is causing exceptionally high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is approximately 7.7 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat-related issues. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the city is experiencing an unusually warm period, with no need for heating.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Diffun.
